author: AuroraPerego
body:
#### PR description:

This PR addresses issue #50210, where the `FWLite` build was failing due to a dependency of `DataFormats/EgammaTrackReco` on `TrackingTools/PatternTools`. To avoid this, since `ConversionTrack`s are not stored in a file, the files have been moved under `RecoEgamma/EgammaTools`. 
In addition, I reverted the workaround added in #50286, making the dependency explicit again.

#### PR validation:

The affected modules compile successfully
title: Move `ConversionTrack.h` to `RecoEgamma/EgammaTools` to avoid `FWLite` build errors
